title: elymus glaucus var. virescens
intro: Elymus glaucus var. virescens, also known as green wildrye, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of green wildrye include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and prevent certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Elymus glaucus var. virescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
